title: OP Chickens
body:
Hi everyone!

Welcome to another of my OP Loot datapacks! In this pack, Chickens will lay OP Loot instead of Eggs! For it to work, the eggs have to exist for at least 1 tick... An example of a Chicken Laying Op Items farm can is shown in the image gallery!

Leave the Pack Zipped In Your Datapack Folder! No Need To Type: /reload as this pack will auto load on it's own!
